label: CLV Performance
description: Closing line value tracking with hit rate, mean CLV, and P&L breakdown by market and bookmaker.

0.5.note: No direct mock imports — MOCK_CLV_RECORDS sourced via useSportsData().clvRecords.

0.6.note: No async loading path (pure mock architecture).

0.7.note: Empty state: records.length===0 guard renders 'No CLV data available'.

1.1.note: Data via useSportsData().clvRecords — no inline fetch.

1.3.note: CLV records are bet-derived and gated by hasSportsDesk org filter.

1.4.note: No client-level scope for sports CLV.

1.6.note: Empty organizationIds shows all CLV data.

1.7.note: No reference data in widget file.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (CLV tracking on live bets), paper ✓ (simulated CLV with stake=0), batch ✓ (historical CLV analysis). Read-only table in all modes.

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode(); paper mode zeros bets via adjustedBets.

3.5.note: Paper mode: CLV data shows with stake=0 (paper bets have no financial exposure).

3.6.note: No interval or WebSocket in widget.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human checks 3.3/3.4 pending.

4.1.note: No interactive buttons — read-only analytics table.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human checks 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 pending: verify table scroll, overflow within widget.

5.1.note: Target strategies: sports-betting. CLV tracking evaluates bet quality against closing odds — core metrics for sports trading performance analysis.

l5.notes: Agent check 5.1 complete. Human walkthrough pending.

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests not yet written for sports domain.

7.1.note: FIXED: Multiple hardcoded hex colors (#4ade80, #22d3ee, #0a0a0b, text-white, text-zinc-*) replaced with design tokens (text-[var(--pnl-positive)], text-[var(--pnl-negative)], text-primary, bg-card, text-foreground, text-muted-foreground, border-border, bg-muted/30).

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useMemo/useEffect — derived values computed inline in render. Record count manageable.

l7.notes: 7.1 fixed in this pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: No text-[] fontSize arbitrary values after fix. All color references use design token vars.

8.3.note: Uses KpiTile shared primitive for KPI strip. Table uses native <table> elements — acceptable for data tables (not a form widget).

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no interactive div without role. Table has proper th/td structure. Human: keyboard navigation of table pending.

8.5.note: Human-only: resize test at minW=4/minH=3 pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Pure analytics widget — no cross-widget coupling.

relationships.notes: CLV records sourced from SportsDataContext. Responds to hasSportsDesk org filter.

dataContract.notes: CLV data updates after market close. REST on-demand or periodic polling appropriate.

gaps: CLV calculation logic not verified against reference implementation

findings.description: sports-clv-widget.tsx:41,43,44,49,72,78,84,92 — hardcoded hex colors #4ade80, #22d3ee, #0a0a0b; text-white; zinc-* colors
findings.fix: Replaced: #4ade80→text-[var(--pnl-positive)], #22d3ee→text-primary, #0a0a0b→bg-card, text-white→text-foreground, zinc-200/300→text-foreground/80, zinc-400→text-muted-foreground, zinc-500→text-muted-foreground, zinc-600→text-muted-foreground/70, zinc-800→border-border, zinc-800/50→border-border/50, zinc-800/30→bg-muted/30
Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
